title: Team Healthbar
description: Minimalistic health bars, capable of distinguishing teams, with normal teammates highlighted.
body:
~~(The following is the AI translation. Please excuse any inaccuracies.)~~

This is a **minimalist health bar display mod**, but its functionality is **not simple**.


## Health bar display function:

· The color of the health bar can distinguish the teams. Default, the friendly team is blue and the enemy team is red.


· It can display the absorption value (default in gold color).


· Before attacking, in invisibility, or 5 seconds after not attacking, the health bar will be hidden.


· When dealing damage to enemies, a white buffer bar will appear on the health bar, which can help increase your accuracy~


## Team Highlight Function:


· Teammates will receive normal highlighting. This effect is unidirectional and can only be seen by teammates. The default color is the same as the health bar.


· When enemies have the highlighting effect, the glowing color will change to the corresponding color of the health bar.


· When the team sets a color, the glowing color will change to the color of the team.


## Multiple Configurable Items:


Length, width, color of the health bar, visibility range, retention duration. 





>>>
This module was created by me using AI. If you encounter any issues, please submit them to me.
